title: Ground Battle on Dathomir
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Dathomir}} {{Battle |prev=[[Ground Battle on Hypori]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' |conc=[[Blockade of Dathomir]] |next=[[Ground Battle on Bespin]] |image=[[File:SilriCage.jpg]] |name=Ground Battle on Dathomir |conflict= |date=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' places this battle between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle over Coruscant]], which are respectively set in 0 ABY and 3 ABY according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |place=[[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] |result=Silri freed, Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] killed, prisons destroyed |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=[[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Unidentified Imperial governor (Dathomir)|Imperial Governor]] † |commanders2=[[Tyber Zann]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] *6 [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] *[[TIE ap-1|TIE Maulers]] *[[Self-Propelled Medium Artillery|SPMA-Ts]] *[[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M Saber-class repulsor tanks]] *[[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AAs]] *[[HAVt B5 Juggernaut|HAVT B5 Juggernaut transports]] *[[Phase I Dark Trooper|Phase I dark troopers]] *[[Phase III Dark Trooper|Phase III dark troopers]] *[[Bp.2 anti-infantry turret]]s *[[XX-10 turbolaser tower]]s *[[Sensor array/Legends|Orbital sensor array]] |forces2=*Tyber Zann *[[Urai Fen]] *10 [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] **[[Silri]] *10 [[Rancor/Legends|Rancors]] *Bribed Imperial forces *Various freed prisoners |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Nearly all ground forces *Orbital sensor array |casual2=*Moderate to heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I think I have located a potential source of dark side Force users for you.|[[Urai Fen]] to [[Tyber Zann]]|}} The '''Ground Battle on Dathomir''' occurred when [[Tyber Zann]], obsessed with opening a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]], traveled with his lieutenant [[Urai Fen]] to Dathomir in order to find a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] to unlock it. ==Prelude== {{Quote|No need to confront the Empire head on there. We're better off sneaking into the planet with a small force and taking what we want under their noses. [...] Send for some Defilers. We'll have them sabotage the sensor system, and then we'll take a shuttle down ourselves.|Tyber Zann|}} Urai Fen, looking for [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] user to open the artifact, told Tyber of Dathomir. However, the Empire had [[Blockade of Dathomir|blockaded]] the planet, so Tyber dispatched a [[defiler]] to disable a [[Sensor array/Legends|orbital sensor array]] in order to give him and Urai an easy landing. The Defiler successfully destroyed the scanner. ==The battle== {{Quote|That is the Imperial Governor's stronghold. His lifeless body will send a message to the Emperor. The use of Dark Force powers against his army should convince the Emperor it would be wise to leave Dathomir.|[[Silri]]|}} [[File:ZannHolocronDathomir-FOC.jpg|thumb|left|Zann deals with the Nightsisters]] After landing on the surface of Dathomir, Tyber Zann and Urai Fen proceeded to attack and destroy the Singing Mountain Prison and its power generator, freeing the prisoners, including three [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]], from whom Zann learned that another Nightsister, Silri, has the power to unlock and analyze the [[Carbonite Sith Army holocron|Sith artifact]] in his possession, so they proceeded to free her from Imperial custody. The initial thrust towards the Frenzied River prison revealed [[XX-10 turbolaser tower|turbolaser towers]] protecting it, so the Consortium forces destroyed the generator at the nearby dam powering the turrets. Having freed Silri, the Nightsister agreed to aid Zann in his quest to learn the artifact's secrets, in exchange for the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the Imperial governor who had put her in public display in a cage. In accordance with this, the Consortium then destroyed the Imperial governor's quarters and Silri slew the governor. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|This is a mistake Tyber. She will betray you as soon as she gets what she wants.''"
"''This is a chance we have to take - She can access the artifact and uncover its secrets.|Urai Fen and Tyber Zann|}} After the battle, Silri joined the Zann Consortium and accepted to decrypt the Sith holocron. ==Behind the scenes== The battle appeared in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' as part of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] single-player story campaign. During the battle, the player has the option to destroy mining facilities, each of which yield 5000 in-game [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and destroy three uplink stations to halt the flow of Imperial reinforcements. The composition of prisoners freed from the three prisons vary on each replay of the battle, save for [[Ewok Handler]]s and three Nightsisters that always spawn upon destroying a prison. Each prison contains initially passive enemy units that appear to be present for the purpose of getting Tyber to bribe them: *the Singing Mountain Prison contains one [[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AA]]. one [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]], one [[HAVt B5 Juggernaut|HAVT B5 Juggernaut]], one [[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M Repulsor tank]], and one [[Self-Propelled Medium Artillery|SPMA-T]]. *the Frenzied River Prison contains three AT-ATs. *the Misty Falls Prison contains five [[TIE ap-1|TIE Maulers]], however bribing them fails to work in practice as bribing one results in all other TIE Maulers becoming aggressive. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stID|Ground Battle on Dathomir}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Dathomir (Aufstieg des Zann-Konsortiums) |es=Batalla de Dathomir (Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Dathomir, Ground Battle on}} [[Category:Battles of Dathomir]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]]
